title: tanacetum grossheimii
intro: Tanacetum grossheimii, also known as the Grossheim tansy or Caucasian tansy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oil content, which contains compounds like camphor, borneol, and thujone. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, headaches, and fever, thanks to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. Tanacetum grossheimii can be prepared for medicinal use in the form of infusions, teas, or essential oil extracts, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
